_scoring_prompt:
CANDIDATE: Rushabh Thakurdware
STATUS: Final year B.Tech student
EDUCATION: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering in Computer Science Engineering from Yeshwantrao Chavan College of Engineering
GRADUATION: 2027 batch | CGPA: 8.15
EXPERIENCE LEVEL: fresher (max 2 years)

TECHNICAL SKILLS:
Core Java, JavaScript, C++, C, Python, Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Node js, Express js, Docker, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Mongo DB, React js, Html, CSS, GSAP, Three JS, Servlet, SAP Erp Software (MM Module), Rust, Streamlit, Swing

COMPETITIVE PROGRAMMING:
LeetCode:  rating,  problems solved
CodeChef: 
Earned more than 14 badges of Leetcode

KEY PROJECTS:
- CODELENS: A distributed AI-as-a-Service application using React, Java Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL, integrating Gemini/Ollama for automated codebase analysis Stack: Spring Boot, React, SQL, Python. Implemented a custom File-Walker algorithm and RESTful pipeline to ingest remote repositories; Provided developers with an interactive 'Logic Explorer' to navigate complex project architectures
- E-Commerce Backend System: A scalable backend system for an E-Commerce platform using Spring Boot and Java Stack: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Rest Api. Implemented RESTful APIs for user authentication, product management, cart operations, order processing, and payment workflow; Integrated database operations using JPA/Hibernate with MySQL for efficient data storage and retrieval

WORK EXPERIENCE:
- Java Intern at Data Alchemy PVT LTP (18 Feb 2026-Current): Engineered robust and high-performance backend applications by leveraging Java and the Spring Boot framework to streamline server-side logic and improve system efficiency
- SAP Intern at Excel Controlinkage PVT LTP (21 June 2025 – 21 July 2025): Gained hands-on experience in SAP MM (Materials Management) and ABAP, understanding the core architecture and data flow of SAP ERP systems

ACHIEVEMENTS: Runner-up in SVPCET Hackathon; Finalist of Central India Hackathon; Led a team in Smart India Hackathon to develop Smart Attendance System Using QR
HACKATHONS: SVPCET Hackathon (Runner-up); Central India Hackathon (Finalist); Smart India Hackathon (Participant)
PUBLICATIONS: 

TARGET ROLES (priority order, derived from resume evidence): Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, Backend Engineer, Java Developer, Spring Boot Developer
TARGET COMPANIES: no explicit preference — any reputable tech company
PREFERRED LOCATIONS: Nagpur, Remote India

ROLE TYPE EXCLUSIONS (this candidate wants HANDS-ON ENGINEERING work, NOT these):
AI content writing, prompt engineering for content/marketing, AI marketing/copywriting roles, non-technical AI trainer roles, data annotation without engineering component

HARD VETOES (auto-disqualify, each tied to resume evidence):
- IT services/outsourcing companies without AI/ML title (evidence: Hands-on experience in full-stack web development and Java, strong problem-solving abilities backed by solid Data Structure and Algorithms skills)
